hooks.command: input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -q "index.html"; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"index.html was modified. Run /health-check to validate the portal before deploying."}}'; fi

input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -q "git commit"; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: Run /deploy-prep before committing index.html to validate the portal."}}'; fi
